steps.assistant_text: Base-pin land via held-base-pointer lever + 3 codegen levers. (1) The `(x != dflt) == 1` boolean form reproduces the target's xor/sltu/bnel-against-1 idiom and 5-saved-reg/0x30 frame. (2) Declaring the held base &D_0+0x5280 as `s32` (its integer value, used only by-value) instead of `char *` colors it into s2 ahead of the held constant 1 (s3), matching target (char* form mis-colored: 9 diffs). (3) The `for`-loop with comma-init schedules the dflt-lo addiu ahead of the two zero-cost prologue moves, closing the last 3-word as1 scheduler tie. Bulk apply-to-all-live-slots sweep over a 16-entry table; per-slot handler called when slot+0x38 differs from the default object pointer. gl_func_00000000 = canonical USO placeholder callee.
